landing.hero_subtitle: misú is an AI-powered legal platform built for Romanian and EU legal professionals. Analyze contracts, manage documents, and stay compliant — all in one place.
landing.features_subtitle: From document analysis to compliance checking — misú brings modern AI tools to legal work.
landing.features_ai_desc: Upload contracts and legal documents for instant AI analysis. Get clause-by-clause insights, risk assessment, and suggested revisions.
landing.features_docs_desc: Organize, search, and manage all your legal documents in one place. Version history and collaborative review included.
landing.features_compliance_desc: Automated compliance verification against Romanian and EU regulations. Identify potential risks before they become problems.
landing.features_i18n_desc: Full support for Romanian and English. Analyze documents in both languages with native-level accuracy.
landing.cta_title: Ready to transform your legal workflow?
landing.cta_subtitle: Join professionals who use misú to streamline their document review and compliance processes.
